text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm taking a break at the park when I<n>see a
bunch of kids chasing an<n>Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh ho ho ho! You won't catch me in a<n>million
years!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
Dang it! Give us another chance!<n>We'll get you
this time!

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text: Yeah, we'll corner you this time for<n>sure!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
As a princess, I welcome any<n>challenge! Let's
see what you've got!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Wait uuuuup!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I've never seen such a one-sided<n>game of tag.
Kawakami Princes is no<n>easy target. She leaps
over a swing<n>and scales the jungle gym with
ease.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Hehe! None of youare a match for me!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
That's no fair! You're older so you<n>hafta go
easy on us!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A princess never pulls her punches! If<n>you're
mad that you can't win, then<n>you need to think
harder and figure<n>out how to beat me!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
There's no problem that can't be<n>solved as long
as you have wisdom,<n>courage, and an iron fist!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: You over there! You agree with me,<n>don't you?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you. You're a master instructor<n>of running,
so give some advice to<n>these children!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Well, there's no way they stand a<n>chance of
winning a footrace against<n>an Umamusume, so to
even the odds...
choice_data_list: Why not change the rules a little?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
If Kawakami Princess has to catch all<n>of the
children on her own, it should be<n>a challenge
even for her.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't sit well with me for a<n>princess such as
myself to be called<n>an "it," but...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A princess's worth boils down to<n>how well she
can nab a prince!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I shall accept this<n>challenge! I'll have
you all rounded up<n>in no time! I'll start counting,
so get<n>ready. One, two, three...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
On the count of ten, Kawakami<n>Princess begins
chasing down the<n>children with alarming ferocity
and<n>catches them one after another!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I suggest adding a rule where the<n>children can
step on her shadow to<n>tag her, so they don't
necessarily<n>need to physically catch up with her.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
My, giving them the privilege to touch<n>a
princess's shadow since they<n>cannot quite
reach me is an excellent<n>compromise!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely wonderful. This reminds<n>me of stories
where the noble knight<n>forever chases after a
princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Now, then! Try your hardest to catch<n>me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess dashes off with a<n>flourish.
She brilliantly uses the shade<n>of the trees to
evade her own shadow<n>being touched.
